description_long: This object is a pair of standard orange traffic cones, each featuring a conical shape with a wide, octagonal base for stability. The cones are predominantly orange with two broad, horizontal white reflective stripes encircling the upper and middle sections. The surfaces show visible signs of wear, including scuff marks, dirt, and some fading, indicating outdoor use. The tips of the cones are rounded and slightly blunted, with no attachments or holes. The bases are thick, flat, and slightly raised, designed to prevent tipping and provide a stable footprint. No logos, text, or additional markings are visible on any part of the cones.
description: A pair of orange traffic cones with white reflective stripes, wide octagonal bases, and visible signs of outdoor wear.
description_view_0: Two orange traffic cones side by side, showing their conical bodies, white stripes, and wide octagonal bases.
description_view_1: Front view of the cones, emphasizing the pointed tips and the alignment of the white stripes around the cones.
description_view_2: Side view of the cones, highlighting the broad bases and the full height of the conical shapes.
description_view_3: Rear view of the cones, showing the back curvature, base thickness, and surface wear.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Each cone has two wide, horizontal white reflective stripes encircling the upper and middle sections.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is rounded, solid, and orange, with no attachments or holes.
attribute_base_design: The base is wide, octagonal, flat, and thick, made of sturdy plastic for stability, with some visible scuff marks and dirt.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos or markings are visible.
attribute_condition: Lightly used, with visible scuff marks, dirt, and some fading.
